dataList.content: Unlock {0} or more EXTREME Difficulty Theme Packs
Clear Floor 15 of the Mirror Dungeon without obtaining E.G.O Gift 'Lunar Memory'
Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher after using the Skill Search function once or more
Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher with {0} or more Liu Assoc. Identities in your Loadout at the time of completion (Incompletable by Rental Teams)
Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher with {0} or more The Middle Identities in your Loadout at the time of completion (Incompletable by Rental Teams)

Defeat the 4 'Charm, Wander, Doubt,' 'Textbook,' 'Blade and Artwork,' and 'The Unsevering' Theme Pack bosses with 3 or more The House of Spiders Identities, with 'LCB Sinner Ryōshū', in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

Defeat the 'The Heartbreaking' Theme Pack boss with 3 or more Wuthering Heights Identities, including 'Wild Hunt Heathcliff', in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

Defeat the 'The Infinite Procession' Theme Pack boss with 'Cinq West Section 3 Meursault,' 'Zwei West Section 3 Sinclair,' 'Fanghunt Office Fixer Hong Lu,' and 'Firefist Office Survivor Gregor' Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Defeat the 'Murder on the WARP Express BokGak' Theme Pack boss with 4 or more Bloodfiend Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Defeat the 'The Unconfronting' Theme Pack boss with 2 or more Mechanical Amalgam Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Defeat the 'Miracle in District 20 BokGak' Theme Pack boss with only Heathcliff and Don Quixote Identities on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Defeat the 'Timekilling Time BokGak' Theme Pack boss with 2 or more T Corp. Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Defeat the 'A Beautiful Voice' Theme Pack boss with 'Wild Hunt Heathcliff' Identity on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

Defeat the 5 'Murder on the WARP Express,' 'Murder on the WARP Express BokGak,' 'La Manchaland Re-opening,' 'The Infinite Procession,' and 'The Dream Ending' Theme Pack bosses with 'The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote' Identity on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
Clear Hidden Node - The House of Spiders: The Thumb
Clear Hidden Node - The House of Spiders: The Index
Clear Hidden Node - The House of Spiders: The Middle
Clear Hidden Node - The House of Spiders: The Ring
